title: Word Garden - Fill in the Blanks
description: A gentle reading challenge adventure where children fill in missing words.
author: Freya Stories

pages.text:
Word Garden

Fill in the Blanks
The little squirrel loved to play in the garden every morning.

readingChallenge.promptText: Can you fill in the missing words?

pages.text: The birds sang a happy song in the tall trees.
You filled in all the words! What a clever reader you are!

localizedTitle.en: Word Garden - Fill in the Blanks
localizedTitle.es: Jardín de Palabras - Rellena los Espacios
localizedTitle.fr: Jardin de Mots - Remplir les Blancs
localizedTitle.it: Giardino di Parole - Riempi gli Spazi
localizedTitle.pt: Jardim de Palavras - Preencha os Espaços
localizedTitle.ja: 言葉の庭 - 空欄を埋めよう
localizedTitle.nl: Woordentuin - Vul de Lege Plekken In

localizedDescription.en: A gentle reading challenge adventure where children fill in missing words.
localizedDescription.pl: Łagodna przygoda z wyzwaniem czytelniczym, gdzie dzieci uzupełniają brakujące słowa.
localizedDescription.es: Una suave aventura de lectura donde los niños rellenan las palabras que faltan.
localizedDescription.de: Ein sanftes Lese-Abenteuer, bei dem Kinder fehlende Wörter ergänzen.
localizedDescription.fr: Une douce aventure de lecture où les enfants complètent les mots manquants.
localizedDescription.it: Una dolce avventura di lettura dove i bambini completano le parole mancanti.
localizedDescription.pt: Uma aventura suave de leitura onde as crianças preenchem as palavras que faltam.
localizedDescription.ja: 子どもたちが足りない言葉を埋めるやさしい読書チャレンジ冒険。
localizedDescription.ar: مغامرة قراءة لطيفة حيث يملأ الأطفال الكلمات المفقودة.
localizedDescription.tr: Çocukların eksik kelimeleri doldurduğu nazik bir okuma macerası.
localizedDescription.nl: Een zacht leesavontuur waar kinderen ontbrekende woorden invullen.
localizedDescription.da: Et blidt læseeventyr hvor børn udfylder manglende ord.
localizedDescription.la: Aventura lectura mitis ubi pueri verba deesse implent.
localizedDescription.zh: 一个温和的阅读挑战冒险，孩子们填写缺失的单词。
